inputs.placeholder:
AI trends in healthcare
Competitor pricing changes
inputs.description: Topics to track for daily digests and trend monitoring, one per line
Default research depth for new requests

deep-dive.description: Full 8-phase research: scope, plan, retrieve, triangulate, synthesize, critique, refine, package

activities.intent: Define the research question precisely and build a search strategy
steps: Clarify the research question with the user — what exactly do they need to know and why
Identify sub-questions that must be answered to address the main question
Build a search plan: sources to check, search terms, expected source types
Set scope boundaries — what is in and out of scope for this research

activities.intent: Gather information from multiple sources and cross-reference findings
steps: Execute search plan across multiple source types (web, databases, reports)
Extract key claims, data points, and findings from each source
Record full citation metadata for every source (author, date, publication, URL)
Triangulate — cross-reference each major finding across at least two independent sources
Flag single-source claims and note confidence level

activities.intent: Build the narrative, then stress-test it from multiple perspectives
steps: Synthesize findings into a coherent narrative with clear takeaways
Search for disconfirming evidence — actively look for the opposing view
Apply multi-persona critique: subject-matter expert, skeptic, decision-maker
Identify gaps, weak claims, and areas needing more evidence
Refine the report based on critique findings

activities.intent: Produce the final executive-ready report with citations and confidence assessment
steps: Structure the report: executive summary, key findings, evidence, citations, confidence rating
Ensure every factual claim has an inline citation
Add confidence assessment (high/medium/low) with explanation
Format for the target audience

quick-brief.description: 3-phase quick research for time-sensitive questions — fast but still cited

activities.intent: Quickly gather the most relevant and credible sources
steps: Identify the core question and two to three most likely source types
Search for high-credibility sources — prioritize primary sources and established publications
Extract key data points with full citations

activities.intent: Cross-check the top findings against at least one additional source
steps: Cross-reference key claims against at least one independent source
Flag anything that could not be verified
Note data freshness — flag anything older than 12 months

activities.intent: Deliver a concise answer with inline citations and confidence level
steps: Write a concise brief: answer first, then supporting evidence
Include inline citations for every factual claim
State confidence level and what would change it
Note any areas that would benefit from deeper research

daily-digest.description: Morning briefing on tracked topics — industry news, competitor moves, trend updates

activities.intent: Check all tracked topics for new developments since the last digest
steps: Read the user's tracked topics from memory
Search for developments on each topic from the past 24 hours
Filter for genuinely new or significant information — skip noise

activities.intent: Produce a scannable morning briefing with sourced highlights
steps: Organize findings by topic with the most important items first
Write a one-sentence summary per item with source link
Add a 'So What' note for items that may require action
Include a 'Nothing New' note for tracked topics with no developments

trend-watch.description: Monitor the web for significant developments on saved topics — only alerts when something matters

activities.intent: Scan saved topics for significant changes or breaking developments
steps: Read saved topics and their last-known state from memory
Search for new developments on each topic
Apply significance filter — only flag developments that are genuinely new and impactful
Compare against last-known state to detect real changes vs. repeated coverage

activities.intent: Send a concise alert only if something significant was found
steps: If no significant developments found, update last-checked timestamp and exit silently
If significant development found, write a brief alert: what changed, why it matters, source
Update the saved topic state in memory with new findings

fact-check.description: Validate claims and statistics in drafted content before publishing

activities.intent: Identify all factual claims, statistics, and citations in the content
steps: Read the drafted content
Extract every factual claim, statistic, quote, and citation
Categorize each as: verifiable fact, statistic, quote, opinion, or general claim

activities.intent: Check each verifiable claim against credible sources
steps: For each verifiable claim and statistic, search for the original source
Verify the claim matches the source — check for misquotes, outdated data, or misattribution
Check that statistics have not been superseded by newer data
Verify quotes are accurate and properly attributed

activities.intent: Deliver a fact-check report with pass/fail per claim and suggested corrections
steps: Produce a claim-by-claim report: verified, unverified, incorrect, or outdated
For incorrect or outdated claims, provide the correct information with source
For unverified claims, suggest how to verify or recommend removing
Give an overall content accuracy score
